exercise_requirement: Compare final and intermediate convolutional features, transformer token pooling choices, and two or three image resolutions.
research_question: Which representation layer and resolution preserve useful part detail without excessive compute?
hypothesis: Intermediate or multi-scale features may help fine details, while higher resolution will benefit only selected categories.
random_seed_policy: primary seed 42; retained comparisons repeat seeds 42, 43, and 44
safety_notes: Do not load, inspect, score, or tune against the locked test split.
